title: 12 Lead ECG Monitoring
content_markdown:
#### Indications

- For assessment of patients with cardiovascular complaints.

#### Procedure

- Clip and clean areas as required.

- Locate and apply electrode to V1: 
- 4th intercostal space, right lateral to the sternum.

- Locate and apply electrode to V2: 
- 4th intercostal space, left lateral to the sternum.

- Locate and apply electrode to V4: 
- 5th intercostal space, mid clavicular line of the left side of the chest.

- Locate and apply electrode to V6: 
- 5th intercostal space, mid axillary line, of the left side of the chest.

- Locate and apply electrode to V3 and V5: 
- V3 is placed diagonally between V2 and V4.
- V5 is placed on the fifth intercostal space between V4 and V6.

- Print ECG, ensure the patient is as still as possible.

#### Specific Notes

- For women with large breast tissue, place V4-V6 at the highest point beneath the breast. Bras may be left in place.
- Ensure the patient is fully aware that their chest and breasts may need to be exposed and obtain their consent prior to commencement of the procedure.
